tluaMetatableChained.tlua(12,20): error TLUA2339: Property 'nowhere' does not exist on type '{ fromBase: boolean; fromMid: number; fromTop: string; }'.
tluaMetatableChained.tlua(23,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== tluaMetatableChained.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // A metatable's __index may be a table that has a metatable of its own, and Lua keeps
    // walking. Nothing special is needed for that: each pairing already carries the members it
    // inherited, so a chain merges one link at a time.
    
    local base = { fromBase = true };
    local mid = setmetatable({ fromMid = 1 }, { __index = base });
    local top = setmetatable({ fromTop = "t" }, { __index = mid });
    
    local t1: string = top.fromTop;
    local m1: number = top.fromMid;
    local b1: boolean = top.fromBase;
    local absent = top.nowhere;
                       ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'nowhere' does not exist on type '{ fromBase: boolean; fromMid: number; fromTop: string; }'.
    
    // Three deep, and the nearest link still wins a collision.
    local deep = setmetatable({ own = 1 }, { __index = top });
    local d1: number = deep.own;
    local d2: boolean = deep.fromBase;
    
    local shadowBase = { v = "base" };
    local shadowMid = setmetatable({ v = 1 }, { __index = shadowBase });
    local shadowTop = setmetatable({ }, { __index = shadowMid });
    local s1: number = shadowTop.v;
    local s2: string = shadowTop.v;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
